feature_title: Kima Hub Upstream — Deferred: Track Title Formatting (KH-14)

companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# Kima Hub Upstream — Deferred: Track Title Formatting (KH-14)

## Document Status
- Last updated: 2026-03-02
- Feature: Foobar2000-style track title format strings
- Scope: Deferred — not adopting
- Implementation state: Deferred

## Origin

Upstream: `chevron7locked/kima-hub` v1.5.0 → v1.6.0, item KH-14.

## What the Upstream Change Does

A self-contained ~133-line expression evaluator implementing Foobar2000-style format strings for runtime track title display customization (e.g., `%artist% - %title%`).

## Deferral Reasoning

Soundspan uses database-level `displayTitle`/`displayTrackNo` overrides (per-track user overrides in Prisma schema) — a fundamentally different approach. Adopting would require:

1. A new system/user setting for format string templates
2. Integration into every track display location (player, queue, library, search, Subsonic responses)
3. A migration path from current DB overrides
4. Runtime format evaluation on every track render

Low user demand; no functional gap addressed by this feature.

## Revisit Criteria

- User feedback specifically requests configurable track display formatting
- Multiple users report friction with per-track displayTitle overrides
